signingConfig.note: Generate keystore: keytool -genkey -v -keystore ebcos-release.keystore -alias ebcos -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000

en-US.title: EBC-OS — Field Operations
en-US.shortDescription: Construction field management for crews, foremen, drivers, and PMs.
en-US.fullDescription:
EBC-OS is a mobile-first field operations platform built for commercial interior subcontractors. Manage crews, track labor hours, file RFIs, submit daily reports, coordinate deliveries, and monitor project budgets — all from the jobsite.

Designed for:
• Crew Members — Clock in/out, log production, request materials
• Foremen — Bulk labor entry, team management, daily reports, RFI tracking
• Drivers — Route management, load verification, return/backhaul workflows
• Project Managers — Cross-project dashboards, CO tracking, budget monitoring

Key Features:
• GPS-verified clock in/out with geofencing
• Photo capture for RFIs, material requests, and daily reports
• Bilingual (English/Spanish) interface
• Offline-capable with sync on reconnect
• Real-time crew and project dashboards
• T&M ticket tracking with audit trail
• Credential and certification management

es-US.title: EBC-OS — Operaciones de Campo
es-US.shortDescription: Gestión de campo para cuadrillas, capataces, conductores y gerentes de proyecto.
es-US.fullDescription: EBC-OS es una plataforma móvil de operaciones de campo construida para subcontratistas de interiores comerciales.

screenshots.note: Required before submission: 6.7" iPhone (1290x2796), 12.9" iPad (2048x2732), Android phone (1080x1920)

preSubmissionChecklist: Generate iOS signing certificate and provisioning profile in Apple Developer Portal
Set up Apple App Store Connect listing
Set up Google Play Console listing
Create privacy policy page and add URL
Upload 1024x1024 app icon to App Store Connect
Upload 512x512 feature graphic to Google Play
Set iOS teamId in this config
Set iOS provisioningProfile in this config
Test release build on physical iOS device
Test release build on physical Android device
Run npx cap sync before each build
